overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow walk through a narrow neon-lit alleyway at night. The camera moves steadily forward between tall buildings adorned with digital billboards and industrial piping, revealing a dense futuristic cityscape in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with large digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking slowly down the narrow alleyway between tall buildings, passing close to a large illuminated billboard

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying a man's face with red 'GETTING CLOSER' text at the top
dark metal ventilation panels mounted on the left wall
thick industrial pipes and conduits running vertically along the right wall
tall illuminated skyscrapers visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alley at night, with the camera moving forward past a prominent digital billboard on the left displaying 'GETTING CLOSER'. Industrial piping lines the right wall while ventilation grilles cover the left. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights, and distant skyscrapers are visible at the alley's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley opening to reveal more of the surrounding cityscape

events.description: large billboard on left moves out of frame, revealing more of the left wall structure
view opens up to show additional building facades and neon signage on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the alley as the left wall recedes and the view expands to show more of the urban environment

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated glass windows visible on the right side
tall vertical sign with illuminated text on the right building facade

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves deeper into the alley, the large billboard exits the frame left, revealing more of the building structure. A glass facade building and vertical neon signage become visible on the right, while the ventilation grilles on the left move closer to the camera. The distant city skyline remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep alley with prominent digital signage and industrial elements

events.description: bright pink digital billboard becomes visible on the right wall

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the alley with tall buildings and bright neon signs visible ahead

entered.detail: bright pink and cyan illuminated digital screen mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera continues through the narrow passage as a bright pink digital billboard comes into view on the right. The industrial piping and vertical neon sign move from the near to mid-ground as the camera advances. The alley remains enclosed with the distant city lights still visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a narrow, neon-lit cyberpunk alley that gradually reveals more of its dense industrial architecture. It begins by passing a prominent digital billboard reading GETTING CLOSER on the left, while wet asphalt reflects the glow of the surrounding lights and distant skyscrapers loom at the alley's end. As the camera advances, the initial billboard exits the frame to reveal a glass facade and vertical neon signage on the right, while ventilation grilles on the left draw closer to the viewer. The scene then shifts as a bright pink digital billboard emerges on the right, pushing the industrial piping and neon signs into the mid-ground. The camera finally continues its steady progression through the enclosed passage, keeping the distant city lights centered in the frame.
